THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, EDMUND S. SORIANO, MARIA W. PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE AND IS THEREFORE DISQUALIFIED FROM RECOVERING FOR ITS DAMAGES. DEFENDANTS ALSO PROVIDED EVIDENCE OF A TRANSFER OF DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE ON MAY 14, 2003 TO CARRIBEAN ARTS. THE ACCIDENT OCCURED ON MAY 27, 2003. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
